Wait for the countdown or tap the shutter to capture a photo.

string.name: night_view_details
string.value: [TS_926775]_Thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm, your phone can capture sharp, bright images even in low-light conditions. ISO and shutter speed can be adjusted manually for more creative shots. When using the front camera to take portraits, the phone provides fill lighting to eliminate unwanted shadows on the subject's face. Selfies taken at night also come out clear and bright.

string.name: snapshot_details
string.value: [TS_926788]_The super-focus camera system integrates the XD Motion engine to capture subjects moving at speeds of up to %d km/h, whether you are shooting up close or from a distance.

string.name: portrait_details
string.value: [TS_926784]_Portrait mode allows you to take beautiful photos with a bokeh effect in the background.

string.name: photo_details
string.value: [TS_926791]_The camera automatically adjusts the exposure and color when you take photos.

string.name: video_details
string.value: [TS_926793]_The camera automatically adjusts the exposure and color when you shoot HD video.

string.name: professional_details
string.value: [TS_926786]_Fine-tune your camera settings to get just the shot you're looking for. Pro mode lets you adjust a host of advanced settings such as metering, ISO, shutter speed, exposure value (EV), white balance, and focus mode.

string.name: slow_details
string.value: [TS_926779]_Capture slow-motion video without length restrictions. Super slow-mo can be used to manually or automatically capture video at ultra-high frame rates. This mode works best in brightly lit environments.

string.name: panorama_details
string.value: [TS_926794]_Move the camera horizontally or vertically to take a panoramic photo.

string.name: light_painting_details
string.value: [TS_926790]_Create special light and shadow effects. Choose from four preset modes (traffic trails, light graffiti, silky water, and star trails) tailored to the most common light painting scenarios. For best results, use a tripod.

string.name: macro_details
string.value: [TS_926778]_Take extreme close-ups with the rear camera, and capture the vivid details of the world around you.

string.name: high_res_details
string.value: [TS_926774]_High resolution photography has a higher pixel density, for greater clarity and detail.

string.name: wide_aperture_details
string.value: [TS_926781]_With a wider aperture, you can capture your subject in detail while creating a soft bokeh effect in the background. For best results, the distance between the camera and the subject should be no more than %d meters.

string.name: fluorescence_introduce
string.value: [TS_950915]_Fluorescence photography is a camera mode which uses a UV fill light. When re-emitted from certain materials, the UV light gives off fluorescent colors which can be captured as stylized photographs.

string.name: click_new_mode_guide
string.value: [TS_950890]_Capture moments in a whole new way.

string.name: panorama_details_more
string.value: [TS_950894]_Slowly pan the camera either horizontally or vertically, while keeping it as steady as possible. Keep the arrow level with the center line. When you finish shooting, the camera will automatically combine everything you've captured into a panoramic photo. This mode is great for landscapes and big group photos.

string.name: light_painting_details_new
string.value: [TS_950887]_Extra-slow shutter speeds allow you to create ethereal effects with light. There are four preset modes, tailored to common light painting scenarios (Traffic trails, Light graffiti, Silky water, and Star trails).

string.name: guidance_xmage_desc
string.value: [TS_950912]_Photos are more vivid and textured, allowing you to better capture pets and scenery.

string.name: guidance_portrait_desc
string.value: [TS_950888]_In Portrait mode, you can use beauty effects and get different kinds of bokeh by adjusting the aperture.

string.name: macro_details_more
string.value: [TS_950919]_A closer focus distance allows you to capture your subject in minute detail. Super macro can be used for both photos and videos.

string.name: snapshot_details_new
string.value: [TS_950889]_Capture clearer pictures of subjects in motion.

string.name: portrait_details_more
string.value: [TS_950918]_In Portrait mode, you can use beauty effects and get different kinds of bokeh by adjusting the aperture. Exposure and color are adjusted automatically as you shoot, to give you the best possible photos.

string.name: guidance_new_interaction_desc
string.value: [TS_950914]_The zoom ring has been replaced with fan zoom. In addition, you can touch & hold the shutter button and then swipe left to take a burst shot, swipe right to record video, or swipe up to zoom.

string.name: professional_details_new
string.value: [TS_950896]_In Pro mode, you can freely adjust advanced parameters to get just the shot you're looking for.

string.name: guidance_new_zoom_desc
string.value: [TS_950911]_The new fan zoom brings you a smoother, more convenient zoom experience.

string.name: high_res_details_more
string.value: [TS_950907]_High resolution photography has a higher pixel density, for greater clarity and detail. In High-res mode, photos may take a little longer to produce. Hold the phone steady until the process is complete.

string.name: light_painting_details_more
string.value: [TS_950908]_Extra-slow shutter speeds allow you to create ethereal effects with light. There are four preset modes, tailored to common light painting scenarios (Traffic trails, Light graffiti, Silky water, and Star trails). For best results, use a tripod.

string.name: night_view_details_short
string.value: [TS_950916]_Night mode allows you to capture sharp, bright images even in low-light conditions, thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm.

string.name: wide_aperture_details_more
string.value: [TS_950917]_With a wider aperture, you can capture your subject in detail while creating a soft bokeh effect in the background. For best results, the distance between the camera and the subject should be no more than %d meters. This mode lets you control both physical and virtual apertures.

string.name: professional_details_more
string.value: [TS_950898]_In Pro mode, you can freely adjust a host of advanced camera settings to get just the shot you're looking for. These include metering, ISO, aperture, shutter speed, exposure value (EV), white balance, and focus mode, among others.

string.name: new_night_view_details
string.value: [TS_1053556]_Capture sharp, bright images in low-light conditions thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm. Four shooting modes are available: Super nightshot, Moon shot, Starry sky, and Starry portrait. When the front camera is used, the device's screen will increase its brightness to provide extra light, allowing faces to appear bright and clear even in the dark.

string.name: new_night_two_view_details
string.value: [TS_1113036]_Capture sharp, bright images in low-light conditions thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm. Two shooting modes are available: Super nightshot and Moon shot. When the front camera is used, the device's screen can increase its brightness to provide extra light, allowing faces to appear bright and clear even in the dark.

string.name: night_view_no_iso
string.value: [TS_1062964]_Thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm, your phone can capture sharp, bright images even in low-light conditions. Shutter speed can be adjusted manually for more creative shots. When using the front camera to take portraits, the phone provides fill lighting to eliminate unwanted shadows, ensuring that faces come out clear and bright.

string.name: accessibility_color_palette
string.value: [TS_1065121]_Color palette button, double tap to activate

string.name: high_definition_panorama_desc
string.value: [TS_1066568]_Slowly rotate the camera either horizontally or vertically to take a panoramic photo. This is great for capturing sweeping scenes, like mountains and skylines, in striking detail.

string.name: ai_composition_desc
string.value: [TS_1066566]_AI can suggest the optimal framing for your photo. Simply line your device up and the zoom will adjust automatically. Works best with scenery, buildings, and people.

string.name: constellation_matching_fails_for_bright
string.value: [TS_1079738]_Environment too bright. Could not capture constellation

string.name: constellation_matching_fails_for_few_stars
string.value: [TS_1079737]_Could not capture constellation. Change your shooting angle and try again.

string.name: custom_filter_card_desc
string.value: [TS_1066567]_Swipe left or right to switch between custom styles. Create your own styles by swiping on the color card, or emulate someone else's by importing a photo they took.

string.name: ai_composition_open_intro_toast
string.value: [TS_1066565]_AI composition can be used at %1$sx, %2$sx, or %3$sx camera zoom. Results are best when taking photos of scenery, buildings, and people.

string.name: please_improve_ambient_light_new
string.value: [TS_1072996]_When Steady shot is on, picture quality is best when there is plenty of light.

string.name: night_view_no_iso_short
string.value: [TS_1070488]_Night mode allows you to capture sharp, bright images even in low-light conditions, thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm.

string.name: custom_filter_card_swipe_tip
string.value: [TS_1071624]_Swipe in the preview area to select a custom style

string.name: custom_filter_card_more_button_tip
string.value: [TS_1071625]_Tap here to import a custom style.

string.name: ai_composition_open_intro_toast_2
string.value: [TS_1075357]_AI composition can be used at %1$sx or %2$sx zoom. Results are best with scenery, buildings, and people.

string.name: exits_same_card
string.value: [TS_1066193]_A preset with these color parameters already exists.

string.name: accessibility_slider_description
string.value: [TS_1053306]_Double tap to switch, double tap and hold to drag left or right

string.name: custom_filter_icon_hint
string.value: [TS_1089396]_Tap here to switch between XMAGE styles.

string.name: custom_style_operation_tip
string.value: [TS_1091750]_Swipe left to switch to custom styles %s.

string.name: custom_filter_icon_tip
string.value: [TS_1091751]_Tap the %s icon to quickly switch XMAGE styles.

string.name: custom_filter_icon_card
string.value: [TS_1115084]_Tap the %s icon to quickly switch custom styles.

string.name: custom_style_operation_tip_right
string.value: [TS_1091749]_Swipe right to switch to custom styles %s.

string.name: depth_motion_desc
string.value: [TS_1089516]_When you take a photo of a person, cat, or dog in Photo mode, depth and motion data will be retained to allow for post editing.

string.name: accessbility_camera_swipe_tip
string.value: [TS_1090707]_Swipe left to take a burst photo, swipe right to record a video

string.name: improved_light_for_better_blurring
string.value: [TS_1095847]_Improve lighting conditions for a better blurring effect.

string.name: quectel_point_for_better_blurring
string.value: [TS_1095840]_Move farther away for a better blurring effect.

string.name: battery_desc_stop
string.value: [TS_1102205]_Battery extremely low. Recording automatically stopped and saved.

string.name: battery_desc_unable
string.value: [TS_1102206]_Battery extremely low. Unable to start recording.

string.name: camera_watermark_location_request_dialog_content
string.value: [TS_1101195]_This is used to display location info in photo watermarks.

string.name: record_permission_introduction_security
string.value: [TS_868384]_This is used for recording videos, taking moving pictures, and audio control.

string.name: security_confirm_permissions_needed
string.value: [TS_868386]_This app requires the %1$s, %2$s, and %3$s permissions. To display the photos and videos you take, it needs to read images, videos, and location information. It may also need to use the microphone to record audio.

string.name: cinematic_video_physics_aperture_edit_not_supported_toast
string.value: [TS_1109970]_Note: Physical aperture settings can't be adjusted during editing.

string.name: stage_details_flagship
string.value: [TS_1112912]_This mode is optimized for shooting concerts and other stage performances.

string.name: stage_details_nova
string.value: [TS_1112913]_Stage mode is great for shooting gigs, concerts, plays, and other performances.

string.name: stage_details_more_nova
string.value: [TS_1112911]_Stage mode is great for shooting gigs, concerts, plays, and other performances. It's optimized to perform well in scenarios with complex stage lighting, so you can capture performers in crisp detail and vivid color.

string.name: stage_details_more_flagship
string.value: [TS_1113035]_This mode is optimized for shooting concerts and other stage performances, so you can capture performers and lighting effects in crisp detail and vivid color. This mode can be used for both photos and videos.

string.name: rotation_suggestion_guide_vertically
string.value: [TS_1122055]_Hold your phone vertically for a better composition.

string.name: rotation_suggestion_guide_horizontal
string.value: [TS_1122056]_Hold your phone horizontally for a better composition.

string.name: custom_style_operation_tips
string.value: [TS_1120843]_Swipe left to switch to custom styles.

string.name: device_storage_space
string.value: [TS_1122640]_Insufficient storage. Camera may lag. Free up space to restore performance.

string.name: location_permission_description_without_starry_sky
string.value: [TS_1125394]_This is used to record where photos and videos were taken and show location information in watermarks.

string.name: location_permission_description
string.value: [TS_1125396]_This is used to record where photos and videos were taken, show location information in watermarks, and provide the star map feature.

string.name: accessibility_double_click_desc
string.value: [TS_1125395]_Double-tap to activate, or double-tap and hold to open more options

string.name: settingView_entry_prompt_information
string.value: [TS_1128999]_For Settings %s, tap or swipe up on the arrow at the bottom.
